{{Infobox character
| name = Elaina
| parents = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Elaina is a character who appears in the narrative alongside [[Leah]] and [[Alin]]. During an interaction involving [[Vasha]], she is identified by name while pointing toward the individual's strength.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Elaina is the daughter of [[Indirial]], characterized by her short blond hair and pale skin. She possesses her father's eyes and was once held captive within a cage. This imprisonment involved being kept in a dangling cage.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] is [[Indirial]]'s daughter and was held in a cage.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] is held in a dangling cage.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] is [[Indirial]]'s daughter.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] has pale skin and short blond hair.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elaina]] has her father's eyes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
